MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Maria Schindler (415-677-7597) of Severson & Werson for Aurora Loan Service, defendant and moving party; No other appearance

Defendant submitts to the tentative except as to the sixth cause of action - Sixth cause of action is argued. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as to the first, second, third, fourth and fifth causes of action and takes the matter under submission as to the sixth cause of action only. Defendant submits a proposed order and submits an errata as to the deed of trust and requests that the court take judicial notice. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Not reported (D501)
